title: BCC function - Emails & Activities
excerpt: I’m helping a colleague with her Monday account and we can’t seem to get any of the emails to the client to copy over in “Emails & Activities” even if she’s using the BCC address. She’s sending the email to the client em…

posts.author: TheBox (Mark )
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m helping a colleague with her Monday account and we can’t seem to get any of the emails to the client to copy over in “Emails & Activities” even if she’s using the BCC address. She’s sending the email to the client email associated with the item but nothing is copying over.

I know in my account it seemed like it took a week or so before Monday started seeing these emails and showing them in “Emails & Activities.”

Is there some sort of trick to get this to work or is it just finicky?

Thank you!

posts.author: Gina000 (Gina O'Connor)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m also having this problem and it’s broken my entire system! No matter what I do I can’t get the BCC’d email to show up in the emails and activities app. Hopefully someone will from Monday will pick this up soon!

posts.author: avmiz (Avner)
posts.cookedHtml: Are you still facing this email. I am trying to decide whether to switch to Monday as our CRM, but this not working would be a deal breaker. Thanks
